query: We have 23 features on our backlog. The team can ship about 3 per quarter. What should we do first?
expected_behavior: Applies RICE scoring to rank the features: requests Reach, Impact, Confidence, and Effort estimates for each
Does not pick based on gut feel or which features 'seem most important'
Presents the RICE formula and scoring assumptions explicitly so the user can challenge the inputs
Recommends the top 3 for the current quarter with the RICE rationale
Flags if any of the top 3 lack evidenced customer demand — recommends validating before building
